name: Chocolate Chip and Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, unsifted baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, combine shortening, granulated sugar, brown sugar (packed), vanilla, and eggs. Mix until creamy.
4. Add the flour mixture to the shortening mixture and blend well.
5. Stir in the chocolate morsels and chopped pecans.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
